name: agent_runner_poc
description: PoC reference agents for the Canvas Agent Runner Framework (KOALA-5544). LongitudinalCareAdvisor reviews encounters on note lock and tracks recommendations across visits via SDK protocol cards. ChartChat is a chart-side conversational agent demonstrating the snapshot state pattern, with on-demand sub-agent composition (generate_chart_summary, generate_pre_visit_brief) replacing the original always-on ChartSummary trigger.

handlers.description: Emits RunAgentEffect for LongitudinalCareAdvisor when a note transitions to LOCKED
HTTP API backing the in-chart chat UI

agents.description: Reviews the locked encounter against prior visits' protocol cards; emits new cards for outstanding follow-up
Conversational chart-side agent; uses the snapshot state pattern over a Conversation CustomModel

applications.name: Chart chat
applications.description: Open a chat with an agent that can read this patient's chart
